name: Lobster or Shrimp Fra Diavolo
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Shrimp or lobster (raw, shelled and cleaned)
2 cloves garlic crushed (or more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in oil, then sauté onion and garlic until golden.
2. Add tomatoes and mix well.
3. Incorporate all other ingredients and mix thoroughly.
4. Simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Remove bay leaf and hot pepper halves.
6. Add shrimp and/or lobster and simmer an additional 15 minutes.
7. Turn off heat and let sit for 10 minutes.
8. Cook pasta (your choice) according to package directions, then drain.
9. Toss the drained pasta with the sauce.
10. Top with extra sauce and fish, then serve immediately with grated cheese on the side.
Serve with plenty of bread and wine. A nice salad with dinner and some cold fruit after are perfect.
